prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-14IN1MULTITOOL-WOOD-KC5011W Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor EDC Compact 14 in 1 Folding Pocket Utility Knife Multi Tool with Wood Body, 3.5 Inch Description: Featuring a nail file, nail cleaner, knife blade, scissors, a wood and rope saw, a hook disgorger, a fish scaler, a can opener, a bottle opener, a slotted screwdriver, tent reamer, cork screw, sturdy reamer and a Philips screwdriver, this classic ASR Outdoor utility folding knife EDC multi tool has you covered.

Compact and lightweight, the multi tool pocket knife weights 0.25LBS (pounds) and measures just 3.5 inches when closed. Whether you're fishing, hunting, backpacking, camping or prepping gear for an outdoor survival or emergency preparedness kit, tote this EDC ASR Outdoor knife multi tool with you on your next outdoor excursion, hike or road trip; each individual tool locks in place for consistent, efficient and reliable performance; it will never ask you to sacrifice or compromise on weight or space.

And lastly, with an included keychain ring incorporated into the design, you can attach the pocket knife multitool to just about anything you need when you're on the go or traveling: backpack, wallet, belt loop, camping gear and much more.

Stay safe and happy adventuring. Search Terms: pocket knife folding EDC camping gear multitool survival kit hiking backpacking trekking bug out bag gadgets tools fishing first aid roadside emergency tweezers nail file scissors utility blade army tactical equipment Features: - 14 IN 1 MULTI TOOL POCKET KNIFE: Featuring a nail file, nail cleaner, knife blade, scissors, a wood and rope saw, a hook disgorger, a fish scaler, a can opener, a bottle opener, a slotted screwdriver, tent reamer, cork screw, sturdy reamer and a Philips screwdriver, this ASR Outdoor pocket knife multi tool has you covered - TASK READY: Whether you're fishing, hunting, backpacking, camping or prepping gear for an outdoor survival or emergency preparedness kit, tote this EDC ASR Outdoor folding utility knife multi tool with you on your next outdoor excursion and road trip; each individual tool locks in place for consistent, efficient and reliable performance - LIGHTWEIGHT COMPACT DESIGN: Compact and lightweight, the multi tool pocket knife measures just 3.5 inches when closed and weighs just 0.25 pounds, never requiring you to sacrifice or compromise on space or weight; all tools tuck neatly away in an attractive, smooth wood body for comfortable handling and durability - KEYCHAIN RING INCLUDED: With an included keychain ring incorporated into the design, you can attach the pocket knife multitool to just about anything you need when you're on the go or traveling: backpack, wallet, belt loop, camping gear and much more - SPECIFICATIONS: Length: 3.5 inches; Color: Red, Silver; Material: Metal, Wood === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 14 in 1 Folding Pocket Utility Knife Multi Tool
